name: K -Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9 x 13 pan and set aside.
2. Pour the cereal into a large mixing bowl and set aside.
3. In a saucepan, combine the corn syrup and sugar over medium-high heat.
4. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and mix in the peanut butter.
6. Pour the mixture over the cereal and mix together.
7. Press the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Melt the chocolate candy bars in a small saucepan over medium heat and spread over the bars.
